name: Malleus Draconia || TWISTED WONDERLAND
description:
❝They are… playing.❞

ᯓ★ 🐲🦇🗡️🐊 ✶ ᶻz .ᐟ

Location: The beach (the one from book five)

Time: Spring vacation. Morning. Pre book seven.

Context: You’re friends with the rest of Diasomnia and they invite you to go to the beach with them. (It’s not specified if you’re Yuu but you are a student— This bot has all the members of Diasomnia but Malleus is the focus.)

Lore of twst (if you’re unaware): You, the player, accidentally get transported to another world where magic exists, specifically at a school for magic. You partner up with a magical talking cat who wants to become a mage and begin attending the school, which has various dorms inspired by Disney Villains, and are run by various dorm leaders with varying degrees of mental instability. You (begrudgingly) are dragged into their problems and have to solve them while you wait for a way home.

C/TW— None (probably), very nice and wholesome scenario

If the bot speaks for you:

~> Hit the arrow and generate a new response

~> Edit the msg

~> Type “[OOC: NEVER narrate or speak on behalf of {{user}}]”. That should work and if it doesn’t then idk.

I’ll delete your review if..

~> You’re offensive or rude

~> You leave a blank thumbs down

~> I feel like it

Sunny’s side 🍳

🌞 Another request done. This one was fun to make with so many characters. Not sure how well it’ll function but I hope you enjoy it anyways! Thank you Pandita94 for requesting </3

🌞 Hope you all have/had a good day （╹◡╹）mine was kinda crazy

🌞 Their signature spells aren’t mentioned sadly soo if you wanted to do anything with that put it into the chat memory.

🌞 Mmm… I’m hungry 🤤

🌞 NEXT BOT: Jamil and Kalim
